input.description: Verify Next.js build and Tailwind compile

content.text:
Tailwind v4's CSS pipeline misinterpreted template literals in `bg-[url(...)]` as webpack module paths. Inlining full data-URL literals fixes it.

[REDACTED]

input.description: Verify Next.js build after fixing select URL literals

content.text:
Hereâ€™s what was wrong and what we changed.

### Why the icons looked off
1. **`dashInputCn` used `flex`** on native controls. For `type="date"`, that throws off WebKitâ€™s calendar control and the date segments.
2. **The select** needed explicit right padding and a stable chevron. `appearance-none` removes the inconsistent native arrow; we draw one with a **fixed data URL** (see below).

### What we changed
- **`dashboardUi.ts`**
  - `dashInputCn`: `flex` â†’ **`block`** so date inputs lay out correctly.
  - **`dashDateInputCn`**: `pr-10`, `color-scheme`, and WebKit calendar indicator size/cursor so the calendar icon sits in the padded area.
  - **`dashSelectCn`**: `block`, `appearance-none`, `pl-3` / `pr-10`, background size/position, and **full inline** `bg-[url("data:...")]` strings (no `` `...${var}...` `` â€” Tailwind v4â€™s pipeline was treating that like `./${var}` and breaking the build).

- **`audit/page.tsx`**
  - Removed the small â€śDates use the calendarâ€¦â€ť line.
  - Date fields use **`dashDateInputCn()`** instead of plain `dashInputCn()`.

Session and other pages that use `dashSelectCn` now share the same chevron alignment; the build completes successfully.

[REDACTED]

input.name: Audit log page enrichment
input.overview: Enrich the audit log UI with new columns (actor, human-readable action, contextual details, deep links where data allows), clearer list chrome (counts, limits, empty states), and small optional backend changes so session rows can link to the right program after updates/deletes.
input.plan:
# Audit log page â€” richer UI and data

## What you already have

The API returns [`AuditLogRow`](frontend/src/types/index.ts)-shaped rows: `action`, `targetType`, `targetId`, `metadata` (JSON), `actorId`, `tenantId`, `createdAt`. The list is capped at **500** rows ([`listAuditLogs`](backend/src/modules/audit/service.ts) `take: 500`), newest first.

**Metadata today (from [`appendAuditLog`](backend/src/lib/auditWriter.ts) call sites):**

| Action | Useful metadata |
|--------|-----------------|
| `program.created` | `{ title }` |
| `session.created` | `{ programId, title }` |
| `sessions.imported` | `{ rows, failed, clientImportId }` |
| `media.presigned` / `media.relay_uploaded` | `{ contentType }`, relay also `{ bytes }` |
| Others | Often empty |

So a **â€śDetailsâ€ť** column can be built **mostly on the frontend** by pattern-matching `action` + `metadata` + `targetId`, without inventing new server fields.

---

## Meaningful UI additions (frontend-first)

1. **Actor (who)**  
   Today the UI ignores `actorId`. The most useful column for admins is **actor email**, not opaque IDs. That requires a **small backend join** (see below). Until then, you can show a truncated `actorId` as a fallback â€” less useful, but honest.

2. **Human-readable action**  
   Keep the raw `program.created` in a monospace chip or secondary line for power users; show a **short label** (â€śProgram createdâ€ť) as primary text â€” reuse the same map as [`AUDIT_ACTION_OPTIONS`](frontend/src/app/(dashboard)/audit/page.tsx).

3. **Details / context column**  
   One column that renders **one line summaries** from known metadata, e.g.  
   - Import: â€ś12 rows Â· 2 failedâ€ť  
   - Media relay: â€śapplication/pdf Â· 1.2 MBâ€ť (format `bytes` when present)  
   - Program created: title from metadata  
   - Session created: title + optional â€śProgram â€¦â€ť if you resolve titles later  
   Implement as a pure helper (e.g. `summarizeAuditRow(row): string | null`) in something like [`frontend/src/lib/auditDisplay.ts`](frontend/src/lib/auditDisplay.ts) so the table stays thin.

4. **Target column polish**  
   - Show `targetType` as a **small badge** (program / session / import / s3_object / creator).  
   - **Truncate** long values (S3 keys, cuids) with `title` full value; optional â€ścopy idâ€ť is nice-to-have.  
   - **Deep links** where routing is unambiguous without extra data:  
     - `targetType === "program"` and `targetId` â†’ [`/programs/[id]/edit`](frontend/src/app/(dashboard)/programs/[id]/edit/page.tsx)  
     - `session.reordered` (target is program) â†’ [`/programs/[id]/sessions`](frontend/src/app/(dashboard)/programs/[id]/sessions/page.tsx)  
     - `session.created` with `metadata.programId` + session `targetId` â†’ session detail or edit under that program  
   - For `session.updated` / `session.deleted`, **links need `programId`** â€” not in metadata today (see backend tweak).

5. **Time presentation**  
   Keep locale string + ISO `title`; add a **muted relative line** (`formatRelativeShort` in [`frontend/src/lib/formatDisplay.ts`](frontend/src/lib/formatDisplay.ts)) for scanability.

6. **List chrome**  
   - Subtitle or bar: **â€śShowing N eventsâ€ť** and a note that results are capped at 500 (sets expectations).  
   - **Sticky table header** on wide viewports (`sticky top-0` + background).  
   - **Row hover** and slightly stronger header separation (matches other dashboard tables).  
   - **Empty state**: distinguish â€śno rows everâ€ť vs â€śfilters returned nothingâ€ť (track whether any query param is set).

7. **Optional client-only extras**  
   - A **search/filter box** over the **already-loaded** 500 rows (e.g. match `targetId`, action, details text) â€” fast win, no API change.  
   - Do **not** expose `tenantId` in the table for this single-tenant admin CMS (noise); keep it only if you later add org-wide views.

---

## Recommended backend tweaks (small, high leverage)

1. **Include actor email in list response**  
   In [`backend/src/modules/audit/service.ts`](backend/src/modules/audit/service.ts), extend `findMany` with `include: { actor: { select: { email: true } } } }` and map to a flat `actorEmail` (or keep nested `actor` and type it in OpenAPI). Update [`AuditLogSchema`](backend/src/openapi/openapiDocument.ts) and [`AuditLogRow`](frontend/src/types/index.ts).

2. **Add `programId` (and title when cheap) to session audit rows missing it**  
   - [`updateSession`](backend/src/modules/sessions/sessions.service.ts): after `updateSession`, log `metadata: { programId: session.programId, title: session.title }`.  
   - [`removeSession`](backend/src/modules/sessions/sessions.service.ts): load the session once before delete (or use delete-return data if available) and pass `programId` + `title` into `appendAuditLog`.  
   This unlocks consistent **â€śView sessionâ€ť** links in the UI for all session lifecycle events.

3. **Optional consistency**  
   - `program.updated` / `program.deleted`: add `{ title }` before delete where possible â€” helps the details column after a program is gone.

No migration required (JSON `metadata` only).

---

## Out of scope unless you explicitly want it

- **Server-side pagination** beyond 500 (needs cursor/limit API and UI).  
- **CSV export** (new endpoint + download).  
- **Actor filter** query param (needs schema + service + UI).  

These are reasonable â€śphase 2â€ť if reviewers care about scale.

---

## Files likely touched

- [`frontend/src/app/(dashboard)/audit/page.tsx`](frontend/src/app/(dashboard)/audit/page.tsx) â€” table columns, links, counts, empty states, optional client search.  
- New [`frontend/src/lib/auditDisplay.ts`](frontend/src/lib/auditDisplay.ts) (or similar) â€” labels, summaries, link builders.  
- [`frontend/src/lib/formatDisplay.ts`](frontend/src/lib/formatDisplay.ts) â€” optional small helper for byte size if not already present.  
- [`frontend/src/types/index.ts`](frontend/src/types/index.ts) â€” `actorEmail` (or nested actor).  
- [`backend/src/modules/audit/service.ts`](backend/src/modules/audit/service.ts) â€” `include` actor.  
- [`backend/src/openapi/openapiDocument.ts`](backend/src/openapi/openapiDocument.ts) â€” schema sync.  
- [`backend/src/modules/sessions/sessions.service.ts`](backend/src/modules/sessions/sessions.service.ts) â€” richer session audit metadata.  
- [`backend/bruno/`](backend/bruno/) â€” if you document audit list response shape there.

---

## Testing / review

- Manually hit `/audit` after seeding: verify new columns, links, and that session rows show program-backed links after backend metadata change.  
- If any **API tests** assert exact audit JSON shape, update them after `actor` / `actorEmail` is added.

Rebuild audit table: columns (Time, Actor, Action, Target, Details), counts/limit note, sticky header, hover, empty states, optional client search over loaded rows
Sync Bruno/OpenAPI; adjust any API tests that snapshot audit list JSON

input.old_string:
const AuditLogSchema = z
  .object({
    id: z.string(),
    tenantId: z.string(),
    actorId: z.string(),
    action: z.string(),
    targetType: z.string(),
    targetId: z.string().nullable(),
    metadata: z.unknown().nullable(),
    createdAt: z.union([z.string(), z.number()])
  })
  .openapi("AuditLog");
input.new_string:
const AuditLogSchema = z
  .object({
    id: z.string(),
    tenantId: z.string(),
    actorId: z.string(),
    actorEmail: z.string().email(),
    action: z.string(),
    targetType: z.string(),
    targetId: z.string().nullable(),
    metadata: z.unknown().nullable(),
    createdAt: z.union([z.string(), z.number()])
  })
  .openapi("AuditLog");

input.contents:
# Session export â€” audit log enrichment

- Plan: actor email on list API, session/program audit metadata, audit page columns + search + links, Bruno/OpenAPI, integration test `audit-list.test.ts`.
- Files: `backend/src/modules/audit/service.ts`, `programs/service.ts`, `sessions/sessions.service.ts`, `openapi/openapiDocument.ts`, `frontend/src/lib/auditDisplay.ts`, `audit/page.tsx`, `formatDisplay.ts` (formatByteSize), `types/index.ts`, `bruno/.../List audit.bru`, `tests/audit-list.test.ts`.

todos.content: Sync Bruno/OpenAPI; adjust any API tests that snapshot audit list JSON

input.description: Re-run full backend tests, show tail

content.text:
Here is what was implemented against the plan.

### Backend
- **[`backend/src/modules/audit/service.ts`](backend/src/modules/audit/service.ts)** â€” `findMany` now `include`s `actor` (email only) and maps each row to a flat **`actorEmail`** (no nested `actor` in JSON).
- **[`backend/src/openapi/openapiDocument.ts`](backend/src/openapi/openapiDocument.ts)** â€” `AuditLog` schema includes **`actorEmail`** (`z.string().email()`).
- **[`backend/src/modules/sessions/sessions.service.ts`](backend/src/modules/sessions/sessions.service.ts)** â€” `session.updated` audit metadata: **`{ programId, title }`**. `removeSession` loads the session first, then deletes, then audits with **`{ programId, title }`** (still **404** if missing).
- **[`backend/src/modules/programs/service.ts`](backend/src/modules/programs/service.ts)** â€” `program.updated` adds **`metadata: { title }`**. `removeProgram` loads the program, deletes, then audits **`program.deleted`** with **`metadata: { title }`**.

### Frontend
- **[`frontend/src/types/index.ts`](frontend/src/types/index.ts)** â€” `AuditLogRow` includes **`actorEmail`**.
- **[`frontend/src/lib/formatDisplay.ts`](frontend/src/lib/formatDisplay.ts)** â€” **`formatByteSize`** for relay upload metadata.
- **[`frontend/src/lib/auditDisplay.ts`](frontend/src/lib/auditDisplay.ts)** â€” `AUDIT_LIST_MAX` (500), `AUDIT_ACTION_FILTERS`, `humanAuditAction`, `summarizeAuditRow`, `truncateAuditId`, `getAuditPrimaryLink`, `targetTypeLabel`, `auditRowMatchesSearch`.
- **[`frontend/src/app/(dashboard)/audit/page.tsx`](frontend/src/app/(dashboard)/audit/page.tsx)** â€” Table columns **Time** (absolute + `formatRelativeShort`, ISO on `title`), **Actor**, **Action** (label + raw), **Target** (badge + truncated id), **Details**, **link** column; count line + 500 cap note; **search** over loaded rows; sticky header, row hover; empty states for no data vs no search matches vs filters.

### Docs / tests / Bruno
- **[`backend/bruno/wellspring-api/Audit/List audit.bru`](backend/bruno/wellspring-api/Audit/List audit.bru)** â€” `docs` block describing the response shape (including `actorEmail`).
- **[`backend/tests/audit-list.test.ts`](backend/tests/audit-list.test.ts)** â€” Signs up, creates a program, asserts **`GET /v1/audit`** returns a `program.created` row with **`actorEmail`**, ids, and metadata; tears down via **`creator` delete** (cascade).
- **[`ai-history/26-audit-enrichment-2026-05-13.md`](ai-history/26-audit-enrichment-2026-05-13.md)** â€” Short session export per repo rules.

All related todos are **completed**. `pnpm test` (backend) and `pnpm run build` + lint (frontend) succeed.

[REDACTED]

content.text:
Created commit **`fe4c0a8`** on **`develop`** with a concise message (not pushed).

**Included (13 files):** audit API (`actorEmail`, metadata on writes), OpenAPI + Bruno docs, `audit-list` test, audit page + `auditDisplay.ts` + types + `formatDisplay` (`formatByteSize`) + `dashboardUi` + `PageLoader`, and `ai-history/26-audit-enrichment-2026-05-13.md`.

**Left unstaged (unrelated to this commit):** auth pages, programs/sessions pages, `ProtectedLayout`, `RedirectIfAuthed`, `HomeRedirect`, `SessionList`, plus untracked `ai-history/25-audit-log-ui-2026-05-13.md`, `loading.tsx` files, and `sessionOrder.ts`.

[REDACTED]
